description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior features a stark contrast between black and white wall sections, with large floor-to-ceiling windows on the front and side facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior. A wide staircase leads up to the main entrance, which is set back between two projecting wings. The upper floor includes an open terrace with a large tree, providing a private outdoor space. The rear and side elevations are more closed, with fewer windows and a solid, monolithic appearance. The house is surrounded by paved surfaces and is designed for an urban environment.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a prominent front staircase. Features a private terrace with a tree and a minimalist black-and-white exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide staircase, large windows, and the main entryway flanked by two projecting wings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the terrace with a large tree and the solid, windowless rear wall.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows, a solid white upper facade, and a visible door at ground level.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the enclosed back, side rooms, and the terrace area partially obscured by the tree.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Wide staircase leading to a recessed main entry, no porch or columns, minimalist design
